hero.title: The Breath of the Great Forest, in the Heart of Phong Nha
hero.subtitle: Discover a secluded retreat with warm timber architecture, tucked away in the deep green forest of Phong Nha - Ke Bang National Park.

intro.label: About Us
intro.title: Rustic Wooden Architecture, Refined Experience
intro.desc: At The Hill Villas, we connect people with nature through the language of wood and stone. Each bungalow is designed for complete privacy, letting you shed the noise of daily life and listen to the breath of the old-growth forest.

rooms.label: Choose Your Space
rooms.title: Rooms & Bungalows
rooms.subtitle: A range of options for couples, families, or groups of friends

featured.name: Deluxe Mountain View
featured.desc: An open private balcony framing the majestic limestone karst mountains of Phong Nha. Premium interiors, complete privacy.

items.name: Standard Bungalow
items.desc: A cozy space with essential amenities, ideal for a minimalist stay deep in the forest.

items.name: Family Bungalow
items.desc: Two adjoining bedrooms with a private forest-facing yard, perfect for families with young children.

items.name: Full Villa Rental
items.desc: The perfect choice for families or groups of friends, with a shared living area and a private kitchen.

amenities.label: Amenities
amenities.title: Care Down to the Smallest Detail
amenities.desc: We prioritize organic, eco-friendly products in every small detail, delivering a sense of complete relaxation just like a professional spa.

gallery.label: The Great Forest of Phong Nha
gallery.title: Views From the Hilltop

testimonials.title: What Our Guests Say
testimonials.subtitle: Genuine reflections from travelers who have stayed at The Hill Villas.

items.quote: A wonderful place to heal. I truly loved the way wood and light blend together here. The morning pool view over the mountains felt truly infinite.
items.name: Minh Anh

items.quote: Breakfast was delicious and full of local flavor. The staff were incredibly warm and welcoming. Thank you, The Hill Villas, for a memorable family holiday.
items.name: Thomas

items.quote: The organic bathroom amenities were my favorite touch — everything felt clean and truly relaxing. I'll definitely be back next year!
items.name: Thanh Hang

contact.title: The Journey to the Heart of Phong Nha
contact.subtitle: We sit in a prime location, easy to reach from the famous caves while still keeping the seclusion you need.
contact.address: Xuan Son Hamlet, Phong Nha, Bo Trach, Quang Binh

footer.tagline: Where the soul comes home to nature.
